sections.name: Hero Section
sections.purpose: A high-impact banner welcoming visitors and showcasing Eco Greenscape's core offering with a compelling image or video.

sections.name: Our Landscaping Services Section
sections.purpose: Showcases Eco Greenscape's range of landscaping and maintenance offerings, often with visuals and brief descriptions.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.purpose: Highlights the core advantages, unique selling points, and values that make Eco Greenscape stand out from competitors.

sections.name: What Our Clients Say
sections.purpose: Displays authentic testimonials and reviews from satisfied customers to build trust and credibility.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.purpose: Provides concise answers to frequently asked questions about Eco Greenscape's services, process, or company.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.purpose: Allows potential clients to easily submit inquiries or request a quote directly from the home page.

sections.name: Company Story & Mission
sections.purpose: Introduces Eco Greenscape's history, values, and dedication to sustainable landscaping and customer satisfaction.

sections.name: Our Team
sections.purpose: Presents the skilled professionals behind Eco Greenscape, highlighting their expertise and passion for greenspace.

sections.name: Our Philosophy & Values
sections.purpose: Details the core principles and environmental commitment that guide Eco Greenscape's operations and service delivery.

sections.name: Certifications & Awards
sections.purpose: Showcases any industry recognitions, licenses, or special achievements to underscore professional credibility.

sections.name: Community Involvement
sections.purpose: Demonstrates Eco Greenscape's commitment to giving back to the local community or supporting environmental initiatives.

sections.name: Introduction to Services
sections.purpose: Provides an overview of Eco Greenscape's comprehensive service offerings for both residential and commercial clients.

sections.name: Lawn Care & Maintenance
sections.purpose: Details specialized services like mowing, fertilization, aeration, pest control, and seasonal treatments for healthy lawns.

sections.name: Garden Design & Installation
sections.purpose: Explains services for creating and implementing beautiful garden spaces, including plant selection, hardscaping, and water features.

sections.name: Tree & Shrub Care
sections.purpose: Covers pruning, trimming, health assessments, disease treatment, and removal services for trees and shrubs.

sections.name: Irrigation Systems
sections.purpose: Describes the design, installation, and maintenance of efficient and water-saving irrigation systems.

sections.name: Request a Quote CTA
sections.purpose: Encourages visitors to request a personalized service estimate or consultation.

sections.name: Contact Information
sections.purpose: Provides all essential contact details, including phone number, email address, and physical address (if applicable).

sections.name: Location Map
sections.purpose: Displays an interactive map showing Eco Greenscape's service area or physical office location for easy reference.

sections.name: Operating Hours
sections.purpose: Informs clients of the company's availability for inquiries, service appointments, and office visits.

sections.name: Detailed Contact Form
sections.purpose: A comprehensive form for specific inquiries, quote requests, appointment scheduling, or general feedback.

sections.name: Social Media Links
sections.purpose: Provides direct links to Eco Greenscape's social media profiles for further engagement and community connection.
